title: AI4Science Materials Research Map
framing: The selected papers connect physics-informed modeling with adaptive experimentation.
intro: This recorded synthetic draft demonstrates how an agent can organize a local literature snapshot without changing the source library.

sections.title: Physics-informed foundations
sections.body: Chen 2022 motivates embedding physical priors; this claim is based only on the supplied synthetic abstract.

sections.title: Adaptive experimentation
sections.body: Liu 2024 frames active learning as a way to prioritize informative experiments; close reading remains required.
